name: Daily Data Update
on:
  schedule:
    - cron: '0 8 * * *' # Запуск каждый день в 08:00 утра
  workflow_dispatch: # Позволяет запустить вручную кнопкой на GitHub

jobs:
  update-data:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v2
        with:
          python-version: '3.9'
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: pip install earthaccess xarray netCDF4
      - name: Download NASA data
        env:
          EARTHDATA_USERNAME: ${{ secrets.EARTHDATA_USERNAME }}
          EARTHDATA_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.EARTHDATA_PASSWORD }}
        run: python fetch_data.py
      - name: Commit data
        run: |
          git config user.name "GitHub Actions"
          git config user.email "actions@github.com"
          git add ./data/*
          git commit -m "Auto-update NASA data"
          git push
